source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for formal workflow UI with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, restrained numeric hierarchy, and dense review-table readability.
layout: 8px grid, compact panels, crest-feather dividers, quill-black rules, orange focus rings, grass-neutral borders, and queue-first workflow dashboards.

prompts.label: Transparent secretary bird crest motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Secretary Bird transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated secretary bird crest motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined secretary bird crest motif: elegant swept-back black quill crest feathers, silver-grey crown plumage, crisp charcoal feather tips, small vivid orange facial skin accent, subtle dry savanna grass-gold reflections, accurate bird-feather texture, formal workflow-system precision, crisp silhouette edges, premium product-design feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full crest silhouette without cropping; no environment, no body, no full bird, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving cool grey, deep black, orange face accent, muted grass neutral, and precise feather detail.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no landscape, no other birds, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Secretary Bird" / "Secretary Bird" using the motif of a secretary bird crest.
Visual identity: formal workflow system, secretary bird crest geometry, cool silver-grey plumage surfaces, precise black quill accents, vivid orange face focus states, dry savanna grass neutrals, charcoal ink, paper-white interface surfaces, calm administrative product polish.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, workflow dashboard with task queues and charts, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, slim crest-feather dividers, black quill rules, orange focus rings, grass-neutral borders, grey paper panels, formal workflow cards, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Overview, Workflow, Queue, Review, Status, Form, Table, Approval, Active, Pending.
Palette names visible: Crest Grey #d7d9d4, Quill Black #181716, Face Orange #f27a21, Savanna Grass #a5a66d, Paper White #f7f4ea, Wing Slate #5f6463, Dust Border #d0c7ac, Alert Clay #b5532d, Night Ink #22201d, Reed Olive #747a45.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
